mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_tsca WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_tsca WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_tsca WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_tsca WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cas_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_tsca ( chemical_name, cas_number, inventory_status, regulation_section, reporting_duty, export_to_us, pmn_required, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{chemicalName}, #{casNumber}, #{inventoryStatus}, #{regulationSection}, #{reportingDuty}, #{exportToUs}, #{pmnRequired}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_tsca SET chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, inventory_status = #{inventoryStatus}, regulation_section = #{regulationSection}, reporting_duty = #{reportingDuty}, export_to_us = #{exportToUs}, pmn_required = #{pmnRequired}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_tsca SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
